summary: ADMINISTRATION This is the skill of running business,

mechanics.name_guess: ADMINISTRATION This is the skill of running business,
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 097 > npcs > ADMINISTRATION This is the skill of running business,
mechanics.excerpt: ADMINISTRATION This is the skill of running business, including the skills needed to manage large military unit; Characters with the Administration Skill may be allowed to operate business on the side with the gamemaster' approval: Such enterprises can provide the character with steady source of income as well as numerous roleplaying opportunities: The exact operation of the business should be worked out between the player and the gamemaster: the simplest level, the gamemaster can have the character make quarterly Action Check to determine the enterprise' earnings losses.
